languages.original_text: "Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."

languages.text: "О-о-о-о, что за сокровищница! Я думала, в прошлой комнате было много интересного, но здешнее великолепие не поддается вообще никакому описанию! Шерин, нужно срочно обследовать здесь каждый уголок".
languages.translation_comment: characters came to Trazyn's museum for the first time

languages.text: "Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."
languages.original_text: "О-о-о-о, что за сокровищница! Я думала, в прошлой комнате было много интересного, но здешнее великолепие не поддается вообще никакому описанию! Шерин, нужно срочно обследовать здесь каждый уголок".

traits.locale_text: "Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."

"Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."

"Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."

languages.text: 「おお、宝庫だ！最後の部屋は興味深いものばかりだと思っていたが、ここまでの豪華さは言葉では言い表せない！シェリーン、この場所の隅々まですぐに探検しよう」
languages.original_text: "Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."

traits.locale_text: 「おお、宝庫だ！最後の部屋は興味深いものばかりだと思っていたが、ここまでの豪華さは言葉では言い表せない！シェリーン、この場所の隅々まですぐに探検しよう。」

languages.text: « Oooh, c'est un véritable trésor ! J'ai vu des choses que je trouvais fascinantes dans la salle précédente, mais elles font pâle figure à côté de cette splendeur indescriptible ! Shereen, nous devons immédiatement explorer cet endroit dans ses moindres recoins. »
languages.original_text: "Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."

traits.locale_text: « Oooh, c'est un véritable trésor ! J'ai vu des choses que je trouvais fascinantes dans la salle précédente, mais elles font pâle figure à côté de cette splendeur indescriptible ! Shereen, nous devons immédiatement explorer cet endroit dans ses moindres recoins. »

languages.text: "Oooh, was für eine Fundgrube! Ich dachte, der letzte Raum war schon voller faszinierender Dinge, aber das hier spottet jeder Beschreibung! Shereen, wir müssen umgehend jeden Winkel dieses Ortes erkunden."
languages.original_text: "Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Oooh, was für eine Fundgrube! Ich dachte, der letzte Raum war schon voller faszinierender Dinge, aber das hier spottet jeder Beschreibung! Shereen, wir müssen umgehend jeden Winkel dieses Ortes erkunden."

languages.text: "Oo, ne hazine ama! Son odanın büyüleyici şeylerle dolu olduğunu sanıyordum ama buradaki ihtişam tarif edilemez! Şirinim, buranın her köşesini hemen keşfetmeliyiz."
languages.original_text: "Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."

traits.locale_text: "Oo, ne hazine ama! Son odanın büyüleyici şeylerle dolu olduğunu sanıyordum ama buradaki ihtişam tarif edilemez! Şirinim, buranın her köşesini hemen keşfetmeliyiz."

languages.text: «¡Oooh, menudo tesoro! Y yo que pensaba que la última sala estaba llena de cosas fascinantes, ¡pero el esplendor de esta desafía toda descripción! Shereen, debemos explorar inmediatamente hasta el último rincón de este sitio».
languages.original_text: "Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."

traits.locale_text: «¡Oooh, menudo tesoro! Y yo que pensaba que la última sala estaba llena de cosas fascinantes, ¡pero el esplendor de esta desafía toda descripción! Shereen, debemos explorar inmediatamente hasta el último rincón de este sitio».

languages.text: “啊，真是个宝藏之地！我原以为上一个房间已经够引人入胜了，但这里的辉煌简直无法用言语描述！亲爱的，我们得立刻把这里的每一个角落都探索一遍。”
languages.original_text: "Oooh, what a treasure trove! I thought the last room was full of fascinating things, but the splendour here defies description entirely! Shereen, we must explore every nook and cranny of this place immediately."

traits.locale_text: “啊，真是个宝藏之地！我原以为上一个房间已经够引人入胜了，但这里的辉煌简直无法用言语描述！亲爱的，我们得立刻把这里的每一个角落都探索一遍。”
